channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tiger, leopard and translocated Kuno cheetah spotted together in Ranthambore
item.description: A highly unusual wildlife sighting was reported from Rajasthan’s Ranthambore Tiger Reserve, where a tiger, a leopard, and an African cheetah were seen together in the same area. This ‘triple sighting’...

item.title: Ex-Brampton councillor seeks removal of integrity commissioner report after complainant withdraws allegation
item.description: A former Brampton city councillor, Gurpreet Dhillon, is calling for the removal of an integrity commissioner’s report that found he breached the municipal code of conduct following a 2019 trip to Turk...

item.title: DOE confirms arrival of two major diesel shipments and LPG procurement to boost fuel supply
item.description: The Department of Energy (DOE) announced that the Philippines will receive two large diesel shipments within the week as part of the government’s efforts to strengthen the country’s fuel supply. Accor...

item.title: Caffeine Improves Learning in Argentine Ants and May Enhance Bait-Based Pest Control
item.description: A recent study published in iScience explores how caffeine affects the behavior and learning ability of Argentine ants, an invasive species known for its global ecological and economic impact. Researc...

item.title: Transgender veteran Bree Fram enters Virginia House race amid Democratic redistricting push
item.description: The article profiles Bree Fram, a former Space Force colonel who was forced to retire under President Donald Trump’s 2025 ban on transgender service members, as she launches a long‑shot Democratic pri...

item.title: Accused in death of Burnaby RCMP officer ruled unfit for trial due to worsening psychosis
item.description: A man charged with the first-degree murder of Burnaby RCMP Const. Shaelyn Yang has been found not fit to stand trial following a mental fitness hearing in B.C. Supreme Court. Jongwon Ham was accused i...

item.title: Simbu claims second place in Boston Marathon with 2:02:47, sets Tanzania national record
item.description: At the 130th Boston Marathon, Tanzania’s Alphonce Felix Simbu delivered a historic performance by finishing second in one of the world’s most competitive road races. Simbu clocked an impressive time o...

item.title: Runner overtaken at Delaware Marathon finish after premature celebration costs victory
item.description: During the Delaware Marathon, a dramatic finish illustrated how costly premature celebration can be in competitive racing. Carson Mello appeared to be leading the race as he approached the final stret...

item.title: Armed Attack in Kwara Community Leaves Soldiers Dead and Residents Missing
item.description: For early hours of Monday, suspected terrorists carry out serious attack for Kemanji community inside Kaiama Local Government Area of Kwara State. According to people from the area, the attackers ente...

item.title: Njuri Ncheke Council disowns elders over defence of businessman linked to fuel probe
item.description: The Njuri Ncheke Council of Elders in Meru County has publicly distanced itself from a section of elders who came out in defence of a businessman linked to an ongoing fuel-related scandal in Kenya. Th...

item.title: IGP Disu reshuffles 56 officers from Police Monitoring and IGP Monitoring units in nationwide posting exercise
item.description: The Inspector-General of Police, Tunji Disu, has approved the redeployment of 56 senior police officers from the Police Monitoring Unit (PMU) in Abuja to various commands and formations across Nigeria...

item.title: Federal officials outline reforms after audit exposes weaknesses in Canada’s international student visa system
item.description: Immigration officials in Canada have presented an action plan to a House of Commons committee following a damning Auditor General’s report that identified significant integrity gaps in the internation...

item.title: Government allocates Sh35.9 billion to enhance youth empowerment, jobs and entrepreneurship programmes
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has presented a proposed budget of Sh35.9 billion for the Youth Development docket for the 2026/27 financial year, aimed at strengthening youth empowerment initiatives acros...

item.title: Halos 1 milyong PUV drivers nabigyan ng P5,000 ayuda; dagdag payouts inihahanda para riders
item.description: Umabot na sa 977,036 public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers ang nakatanggap ng tig-P5,000 cash relief assistance mula sa Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) bilang tugon sa patuloy na pa...

item.title: New York protest over Julius Malema sentencing draws international political reactions
item.description: A small demonstration titled ‘Hands Off Malema’ was held in New York City outside the South African Consulate-General in Manhattan, drawing attention to the sentencing of Economic Freedom Fighters (EF...

item.title: Johannesburg road rage victim Zawar Faisal ul Rehman to be laid to rest following fatal Emmarentia shooting
item.description: The man killed in a road rage incident in Emmarentia, Johannesburg, identified as Zawar Faisal ul Rehman, will be laid to rest at Westpark cemetery on Tuesday. Gauteng police say the fatal confrontati...

item.title: US singer D4vd charged with murder of teenage girl whose remains were found in impounded vehicle
item.description: American singer D4vd, whose real name is David Burke, has been formally charged with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez in Los Angeles, in a case that could potentially lead to the deat...

item.title: Nigeria’s Bank Recapitalisation Signals Stronger Investor Confidence and Financial Stability
item.description: Nigeria government officials don use the recent bank recapitalisation exercise take show say investor confidence dey come back small-small, both from inside the country and abroad. During IMF and Worl...

item.title: Don Jazzy shares humorous view on why some modern marriages struggle to last
item.description: Nigerian music executive Don Jazzy don spark online discussion after him share funny but thoughtful explanation about why many modern marriages no dey last like those of earlier generations. In a vira...

item.title: Bhutan Customs Delegation Visits Kerala to Investigate Cross-Border Vehicle Smuggling
item.description: The article appears to report on a developing cooperation between Bhutan customs authorities and Indian enforcement agencies in Kerala regarding suspected cross-border car smuggling activities. As per...
